debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
M : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ
⊢ M ∈ doublyStochastic ℝ (Fin n) → M.permanent ≥ ↑n.factorial / ↑n ^ n

failed_attempts:
by
  intro hM
  match n with
  | 0 => simp
  | 1 =>
    simp only [Nat.factorial_one, Nat.pow_one, Nat.cast_one, Nat.div_self, zero_lt_one]
    have : M 0 0 = 1 := by simpa using hM.2.1 0
    simp [permanent, Fin.sum_univ_one, this]
  | n + 2 =>
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.cast_zero]
    · exact permanent_nonneg hM.1
    · exact Nat.factorial_lt_pow_self (by simp)
by sorry

by
  rcases n with _ | _ | n
  · simp
  · simp [permanent, Fin.sum_univ_unique, h.sum_eq_one]
  · rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt (Nat.factorial_lt_pow (by simp)), Nat.cast_zero]
    exact permanent_nonneg h.nonneg

  · simp

    exact (hrow 0).ge
  · rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt (Nat.factorial_lt_pow (Nat.one_lt_succ_succ _))]

sorry
